---
name: Module request
about: Propose a new Terraform module for this repository
title: "[module] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Cloud

Which cloud should this module support?

## Domain

Examples: networking, security, identity, compute, data

## Problem To Solve

What reusable infrastructure problem should this module address?

## Expected Inputs/Outputs

Describe the high-level interface you expect.

## Example Use Case

Share a practical scenario for this module.
